session.user: Run `make fix` from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report results.

tool_use.name: Bash

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 make: *** [Makefile:16: fix] Error 1
uv run ruff check --fix --unsafe-fixes E501 Line too long (104 > 100) --> tests/commands/dash/test_filtering.py:45:101 | 43 | state=PlanState.OPEN, # Changed to OPEN to match default behavior 44 | url="https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/2", 45 | labels=["erk-pr", "erk-plan", "erk-core"], # Must have erk-plan label to be returned by default | ^^^^ 46 | assignees=[], 47 | created_at=datetime(2024, 1, 2, tzinfo=UTC), |
Found 1 error.
session.assistant:
ruff failed: 1 issue found
**File:** `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/dash/test_filtering.py:45:101`
**Issue:** E501 Line too long (104 > 100 characters)
The line contains: ```python labels=["erk-pr", "erk-plan", "erk-core"], # Must have erk-plan label to be returned by default ```
This line exceeds the project's 100-character limit. The error is fixable, but since `devrun` is read-only, you'll need to address this by reformatting the line (moving the comment or restructuring the code) in your development environment.
